ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of pressing a next track button. The robot will use its right arm to perform a quick, decisive swipe from left to right, mimicking the forward progression implied by the emoji. The left arm will remain mostly still, providing a stable counterpoint to the right arm's movement.  The animation will focus on creating a sense of smooth but confident motion. Frame 1: The right arm starts in a neutral, slightly forward position, poised to begin the swipe. Frame 2: The right arm moves across the body, with a slight upward angle. The wrist is rotated to point in the direction of the swipe. Frame 3: The right arm reaches its furthest point on the right, the wrist now angled back slightly. Frame 4: The right arm returns to its original position. Frame 5: Both arms return to a neutral position.

frames.beat: right arm poised for action, left arm still
right arm sweeps forward and across the body
the swipe completes, reaching the end point
right arm retracts, completing the button press
both arms return to a neutral resting state
